hero.title: Apps Portal
hero.subtitle: Free tools and mini web applications.

elections.title: Elections Tracker
elections.description: Track election results in real time with charts and detailed statistics.

simulator.title: Election Simulator
simulator.description: Simulate vote transfers between the two rounds of a French municipal election.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.intellectual_text: All content on this site (text, images, code) is the exclusive property of Reda Belkadi, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, distribution or use without prior written consent is strictly prohibited.
legal.data_text: This site does not collect any personal data. No registration is required and no contact form is provided. All applications run entirely in your browser.
legal.cookies_text: This site does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be used for proper site functionality.

about.title: About
about.intro: Apps Portal is a collection of free and open-access web tools and mini-applications, designed to be simple, fast and privacy-friendly.
about.project_text: This portal brings together several independent web applications, each designed to meet a specific need. All applications run directly in your browser, without registration or data collection.
about.tech_text: All contributions are welcome on my
about.contact_text: For any questions, suggestions or bug reports, you can contact us via the main site redabelkadi.fr.
